name: @anima-labs/cli
description: Official Anima CLI — Identity infrastructure for AI agents. Manage identities, email, phone numbers, vault secrets, and runtime configuration.
author: Anima Labs <support@useanima.sh>

scripts.build: tsc && bun build src/cli.ts --target=node --outfile dist/cli.js --external @clack/prompts --external @orpc/client --external @orpc/contract --external @orpc/openapi-client --external cli-table3 --external commander --external env-paths --external ora --external picocolors --external zod && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const f='dist/cli.js';const c=fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8').replace(/^#!.*\n/,'');fs.writeFileSync(f,'#!/usr/bin/env node\n'+c);fs.rmSync(f+'.map',{force:true})"
scripts.build:binary: mkdir -p binaries && OUT=binaries/anima-$(uname -s | tr A-Z a-z)-$(uname -m) && bun build src/cli.ts --compile --outfile "$OUT" && ./scripts/sign-binary.sh "$OUT"
scripts.build:binary:all: mkdir -p binaries && bun build src/cli.ts --compile --target=bun-linux-x64 --outfile binaries/anima-linux-x64 && bun build src/cli.ts --compile --target=bun-linux-arm64 --outfile binaries/anima-linux-arm64 && for b in binaries/anima-linux-x64 binaries/anima-linux-arm64; do ./scripts/sign-binary.sh "$b"; done
scripts.build:checksums: cd binaries && shasum -a 256 anima-linux-x64 anima-linux-arm64 > checksums.txt
